name: dspack-emit-json-render-gate
description: Framework-level gates J1-J3 for the json-render target. Isolated package: json-render requires zod v4, while the repo root is pinned to zod v3 by @a2ui/web_core's peer range - the two cannot share a dependency tree. Versions pinned exactly (json-render is pre-1.0; churn stays contained here).
